memory.summary: I planned to finish my analysis and reading, but my cohort is inviting me to lunch. Given my low energy and sleep debt, joining them might help reduce stress.
I made significant progress on my course assignment before lunch, but I still have reading left to complete after eating.
Despite making progress on the analysis, the imminent deadline combined with my low energy and sleep debt creates a high-stress situation that requires immediate focus.
I missed the deadline for my analysis section despite working on it, which has increased my stress while I still have sleep debt and low energy.
I advanced my course assignment significantly but missed the reading deadline entirely, leaving me with high stress and sleep debt.
I failed to act on my analysis progress again, worsening my stress and leaving the deadline unmet despite low energy.
I made minimal progress on assigned reading despite working 1.5 hours, while my stress remains high and sleep debt persists.
I made meaningful progress on the course assignment analysis, but my exhaustion and high stress levels remain critically unaddressed.
The analysis section is nearly complete, but my critical exhaustion and stress remain unaddressed after another late session.
I missed a critical moment for change while still exhausted, leaving my work unfinished and stress unresolved.
The analysis section is now complete, but my critical exhaustion and high stress remain unaddressed.
I made minimal progress on reading while my exhaustion and stress levels remain critically high.
